name: Silva, Oscar
resolved_employer: El Paso County (Commissioners Court, Commissioner Precinct 3) - policy advisor
evidence: El Paso County's published Commissioners Court payroll report (check date Jan 23, 2026) lists an Oscar Silva under Commissioner Precinct 3, matching the filing's employer 'El paso county' and occupation 'Policy Advisor' and the 79936 El Paso zip. A separate, well-documented El Paso political operative named Oscar 'Vivo' Silva (Battleground Texas political director; Biden for President national coalitions director; Harris for President) exists and is plausibly the same person given the county policy-advisor role and the donor's 172 federal contributions, but no public source directly links that operative to the county payroll entry, so the operative's roles are NOT recorded as affiliations here.

name: Myers, Patricia
resolved_employer: Square One Politics (SquareOne), Brooklyn NY - Director of Giving; goes by 'Peachy' Myers
evidence: Patricia 'Peachy' Myers is the Director of Giving at Square One Politics, which is headquartered in Brooklyn, NY - an exact match on name, city (zip 11216 is Brooklyn), employer, and occupation as filed. Her org bio notes she holds a Masters in Public Affairs from UT and previously worked in affordable housing development in Austin before relocating to Brooklyn, which corroborates an Austin council donation.

affiliations.snippet: Bio page identifies her as SquareOne's Director of Giving; Square One Politics is a hybrid PAC / organization (FEC committee C00641555) that recruits and supports young, diverse, progressive congressional candidates.

evidence: Cara Bertron is a documented City of Austin historic preservation staffer who manages the city's Equity-Based Preservation Plan and previously served as Deputy Historic Preservation Officer; occupation ('Preservation planner') and employer ('City of Austin') match exactly, and zip 78722 (Cherrywood) is a common Austin city-staff residential area. name: Robinson, Jennifer
resolved_employer: Voice Media Group — Director of Membership & Community Development, Dallas Observer (alt-weekly publisher; also owns Westword, Miami New Times, Phoenix New Times)
evidence: Confirmed on the Dallas Observer masthead and in the paper's own promotion announcement: Jennifer Robinson, at Voice Media Group since 2005 (started as a Dallas Observer account executive, moved to marketing/promotions, ran 125+ lifestyle events across four markets), promoted to Director of Membership & Community Development. Born in Midland TX, Texas A&M degree, moved to Dallas 2002 — consistent with the filing's Dallas 75214 address and the 'Voice Media Group / audience development' employer-occupation pair. Full bio read surfaced no board seats, no advocacy-organization roles, and no policy-advocacy involvement; her role is commercial membership/audience work for a newspaper. FEC and Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist searches returned no records for her; she is not a registered Texas lobbyist. Her 74 federal donations with a 0.99 Democratic lean reflect ordinary partisan small-dollar giving with no ideological-PAC ties surfacing in public records.

name: Allen, Trista
resolved_employer: Texas Trial Lawyers Association (TTLA) — Associate Director, Membership & Fund Development
evidence: Confirmed: Trista Allen is Associate Director of Membership & Fund Development at the Texas Trial Lawyers Association, based in Fort Worth (matches filing zip 76133) — corroborated by her LinkedIn, her ttla.com staff email, and the Capital Area Trial Lawyers Association staff page, where she is the TTLA staffer supporting the regional trial-lawyer associations (CATLA, El Paso County, South Plains, Permian Basin). The filing's 'Associate director / TTLA' employer-occupation pair matches exactly. Prior roles listed: GSA, Obama for America, Dallas County District Attorney's Office. TTLA is the plaintiffs'-bar trade association: it operates a PAC (Texas Trial Lawyers Association PAC appears in TEC records) and retains registered lobbyists, and her portfolio is explicitly fund development — so this is an influence-adjacent, not incidental, employer. Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registry search: Trista Allen herself does NOT appear in the TEC registered-lobbyist lists (TTLA's registered lobbyists are other individuals, e.g. Gladys A. Alonzo, James Fields); she is association staff, not a registered lobbyist. FEC search surfaced no ideological-PAC contributions; her 63 federal donations at 1.0 Democratic lean are consistent with plaintiffs'-bar-aligned partisan giving but no specific PAC ties are documented in public records.

affiliations.snippet: Listed as 'Associate Director, Membership & Fund Development at Texas Trial Lawyers Association,' Fort Worth, TX; TTLA staff contact (trista@ttla.com) for the regional trial lawyer associations per the Capital Area Trial Lawyers Association staff page. TTLA is a trade association that maintains a PAC and registered lobbyists in Texas Ethics Commission filings.
